source.description: NASA Global Landslide Catalog (GLC) containing landslide events reported worldwide. Includes rainfall-triggered landslides, debris flows, and mudslides with casualty and damage information.

metrics.deaths: Number of deaths attributed to the landslide
metrics.injuries: Number of injuries attributed to the landslide

geographic_context.focus: Reported landslide events from news, disaster databases, and scientific literature

data_quality_notes: Coverage varies by region - more complete in areas with active reporting
Historical events may have estimated locations and dates
Impact figures from news reports may be estimates or incomplete
sources field contains original data source references
